parameters.content:
## 🚗 Mercedes SB Inventory Sync
**What this does:**
1. Runs every 4 hours
2. Captures sync start time (for stale cleanup)
3. Hits sbmercedes.com's live inventory API
4. Paginates through ALL vehicles
5. Upserts to Supabase `mercedes_inventory` table
6. Removes stale vehicles (sold/delisted) after sync

**Supabase table required:**
Run this SQL to create it:
```sql
CREATE TABLE mercedes_inventory (
  vin TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  stock_number TEXT,
  year TEXT,
  make TEXT,
  model TEXT,
  trim TEXT,
  body_style TEXT,
  exterior_color TEXT,
  interior_color TEXT,
  fuel_type TEXT,
  mileage NUMERIC,
  msrp TEXT,
  msrp_numeric NUMERIC,
  condition TEXT,
  classification TEXT,
  detail_url TEXT,
  scraped_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_mercedes_model ON mercedes_inventory(model);
CREATE INDEX idx_mercedes_color ON mercedes_inventory(exterior_color);
CREATE INDEX idx_mercedes_condition ON mercedes_inventory(condition);
CREATE INDEX idx_mercedes_fuel ON mercedes_inventory(fuel_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_mercedes_mileage ON mercedes_inventory(mileage);
CREATE INDEX idx_mercedes_msrp ON mercedes_inventory(msrp_numeric);
```

changes: Added Capture Sync Start node to track sync timestamp
Added Validate API Response node — exits cleanly if sbmercedes.com is down
Added onError:continueRegularOutput to Get Total Count and Fetch Inventory Page
Added mileage field extraction in Parse Vehicles (checks v.mileage, attrs.mileage, attrs.odometer, certifiedDetails.odometerReading)
Added mileage field to Upsert to Supabase
Added Skip Bad Pages node to handle pages where API returns errors mid-sync
Added Remove Stale Vehicles node — deletes rows where updated_at < sync start (removes sold/delisted cars)
Fixed Log Sync Complete — now reports sync_started, sync_ended, duration_ms instead of wrong vehicle count
Updated Supabase schema in sticky note to include mileage column and index
Sync start timestamp propagated through Build Page Offsets for use in stale cleanup
setup_instructions: 1. CREATE SUPABASE TABLE: Run the SQL from the sticky note (includes mileage column)
2. SET CREDENTIAL: Replace REPLACE_SUPABASE_CRED_ID with your actual Supabase credential ID
3. SET STALE CLEANUP URL: Replace REPLACE_SUPABASE_PROJECT_URL and REPLACE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in Remove Stale Vehicles node
4. VERIFY API: Test-run Get Total Count — should return pageInfo.totalCount > 0
5. FIRST RUN: Click Test Workflow for initial full sync
6. ACTIVATE: Toggle workflow Active for 4-hour auto-sync
